_note: Status codes indicate the suitability of an information container for a given purpose. They flow with the document through the CDE workflow (WIP → Shared → Published → Archive). Aligned with ISO 19650-2:2018 §5.6.4.

S1.name: Suitable for coordination
S1.description: Information shared with the project team for coordination

S2.name: Suitable for information
S2.description: Shared for information only — not for use in further design

S3.name: Suitable for review and comment
S3.description: Shared for formal review and comment by the project team

S4.name: Suitable for stage approval
S4.description: Submitted for formal stage approval by the appointing party

S5.name: Suitable for PIM authorization
S5.description: Project Information Model — submitted for client authorization

S6.name: Suitable for AIM acceptance
S6.description: Asset Information Model — submitted for asset-owner acceptance

S7.name: Suitable for use
S7.description: Published — ready for use in construction or operation

engine_lookup._purpose: Flat key/value form for runtime engine consumption
